chain.thought: Explanation: Looking at the season premiere dates, only Season 6 premiered in September (September 6, 2010). Therefore, Season 6 is the only season to premiere in September.

Explanation:

Only Season 6 premiered in September, making it the sole season fitting the criterion. The Prediction Answer “null” aligns with the unique, singular identification of the September-premiering season within this context, corresponding to Season 6.
